name: W-10 /cl-status text format prints each session_id and held branch per the architecture listing contract
command: mkdir -p sessions && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"cl-100","phases":["E"],"branch":"feat/x"}' > sessions/cl-100.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cl-status.sh" --sessions-dir sessions 2>out.txt && grep -q 'session_id=cl-100' out.txt && grep -q 'branch=feat/x' out.txt && echo listed 1>&2
